signals.value: Automated FNOL intake agent for auto claims
signals.epic_span: Automated First-Notice-of-Loss (FNOL) intake agent for auto claims

signals.value: Customer filing an auto claim; human adjuster
signals.epic_span: When a customer files an auto claim

signals.value: First classify claim severity, then enrich in parallel from three sources
signals.epic_span: first classifies claim severity, then in parallel enriches the claim from three sources

signals.value: Coordinate the enrichment steps and assemble a unified claim record
signals.epic_span: coordinates these enrichment steps and assembles a unified claim record

signals.value: Route high-severity claims to a human adjuster before finalizing
signals.epic_span: Route high-severity claims to a human adjuster for review before finalizing
Loop the enrichment-and-scoring step until the claim-completeness score is at least 0.9
End-to-end intake must complete within 5 minutes at the 95th percentile
Policy system (transactional, read/write)
VIN vehicle lookup service
the weather service
writes the assembled claim to the claims datastore

signals.value: IF a body shop operates their own estimate system THEN obtain the estimate via that partner
signals.epic_span: If a body shop operates their own estimate system, the agent obtains the estimate from that partner

signals.value: IF claim-completeness score < 0.9 THEN re-run enrichment (loop)
signals.epic_span: Loop the enrichment-and-scoring step until the claim-completeness score is at least 0.9

signals.value: IF severity is high THEN route to a human adjuster
signals.epic_span: Route high-severity claims to a human adjuster
The service must be available 99.9% of the time
Recovery point objective of 5 minutes and recovery time objective of 30 minutes

signals.value: PII encrypted at rest and in transit
signals.epic_span: All customer PII must be encrypted at rest and in transit
End-to-end intake must complete within 5 minutes at the 95th percentile
Severity classification accuracy must be above 95%

signals.value: 100% of high-severity claims routed to a human adjuster
signals.epic_span: 100% of high-severity claims are routed to a human adjuster
No PII is written to logs
